feed.description: Mountain biking talk: trails, technique, gear, and the people who build the ride.
feed.title: Singletrack Sessions

bullets:
# Singletrack Sessions — Episode
## The Mechanics of a Quiet, Fast Bike
Host: Maya
Guest: Noah
Maya: Welcome back to Singletrack Sessions.
Today we're talking about drivetrain mechanics, and I'm joined by Noah, mechanic at Spoke & Wrench.
This episode is brought to you by Notion.
